Name: Average time from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed across all variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time between Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation and SW-Reviewer Agreed in cases that include both activities
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time elapsed between Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation and the subsequent occurrence of SW-Reviewer Agreed in each process variant
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average duration from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Awaiting AE Assignment compared to the duration from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Total resolution time of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation when followed by SW-Reviewer Agreed within the same case
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to Manuscript Export Succeeded versus minimum time from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Average time between Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation and Plagiarism Originality Report Completed relative to the time between Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation and SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed'

Name: Elapsed time from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed in variants that result in SW-EIC Accept versus those that result in SW-EIC Major Revision
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed in variants involving reviewer reminders (e.g., Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 or 2)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average waiting time to SW-Reviewer Agreed after Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation in cases with multiple SW-AE Assign Reviewers occurrences
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time from Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed in long-running variants (performance > 1,000,000 seconds) versus short-running variants
Metric: the sum of the function base > 1000000 where base is the duration between the first time instant when `ACTIVITY` == 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and the last time instant when `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation as a starting point for measuring downstream activity durations up to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Cycle Time of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation defined as the time until SW-Reviewer Agreed is first recorded in the case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time it takes SW-Reviewer Agreed to occur after Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation, grouped by case:concept:name
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'", 'end': "activity == 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'", 'aggregation': 'average', 'group_by': 'concept:name'}"
